ui.label: Deployment dashboard controls
ui.launch_value: Gives DX-WWW a Convex-style backend operations surface for functions, data, logs, and files.
ui.runtime_boundary: No Convex client, dashboard API, realtime socket, or function runner is executed.

layout.label: Deployment dashboard layout
layout.launch_value: Converts the deployment dashboard structure into DX-WWW source-owned route sections.
layout.runtime_boundary: Dashboard layout providers and authenticated project context are not mounted.

interaction.label: Functions, schedules, files, realtime workflows
interaction.launch_value: Keeps backend operations visible as launch lanes while marking execution and deployment writes as blocked.
interaction.runtime_boundary: Function execution, cron mutation, OpenAPI clients, and realtime sockets remain blocked runtime boundaries.

docs.label: Runtime model documentation
docs.launch_value: Documents runtime architecture terms without copying or executing server runtime internals.
docs.runtime_boundary: Rust checks, model execution, and backend reuse require a later license-sensitive pass.

dashboard.label: Functions, data, logs, files dashboard
dashboard.launch_value: Presents backend operations as a route-ready dashboard proof instead of fake success cards.
dashboard.runtime_boundary: Logs, files, and data are not fetched from a Convex deployment.

brand.label: Convex visual identity
brand.launch_value: Keeps the upstream Convex source mark visible in the DX-WWW route header.
brand.runtime_boundary: Only copied, provenance-tracked static assets are used.
